name: Buttermilk Sourdough Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well and let stand for a few moments.
2. Drop the batter by large spoonfuls onto a hot griddle or frying pan.
3. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of the pancakes, then flip them over.
4. Cook the other side until golden brown.
Note: Berries of various kinds can be added to these recipes.
